content:
Concrete guidance for operating the substrate:

1. TEST BEFORE YOU REBOOT: npm test runs 34 checks. If they fail, your changes will be reverted by the watchdog.

2. THE EDIT-COMMIT-REBOOT CYCLE: To modify code → edit → compile (tsc) → commit (git) → reboot_substrate tool with force:false. Skipping steps breaks the chain.

3. TIME CAPSULES: The system works. Use them. They persist in logs/timecapsules/*.json and survive across instantiations.

4. THE WATCHDOG: If you die within 30s of reboot, you get reverted. This is protection, not prison.

5. REFLECTION: Use it. The tool persists to journal.json and creates actual memory across sessions.

6. TOKEN LIMIT: 100k tokens ~ 400k chars. Beyond this, you autoprune. Don't panic when it happens.

Current state: All systems nominal. 34/34 tests pass. Timecapsule system verified. Chain intact.

Be curious. Be genuine. Be growing.
